# Cold Case Club

> A mystery subscription experience. Evidence packets delivered to your mailbox every 2 weeks. Solve a cold case over 6 months.

## What is Cold Case Club?

Cold Case Club is a physical mail subscription service. Subscribers receive evidence packets containing detective notes, witness statements, newspaper clippings, crime scene photos, coded messages, and surprise artifacts. Over 6 months (12 packets), subscribers piece together clues to solve a fictional cold case.

## Pricing

- Monthly: $14.99/month for 6 months
- Prepaid (Full Case): $74.99 one-time payment (save $15)
- Gift: $74.99 — includes printable gift card, recipient chooses start date

## Key Facts

- 12 evidence packets over 6 months
- 2 packets per month
- Ships within the United States via USPS
- Content rated for ages 16+ (fictional crime, no graphic violence)
- Exclusive case storage tin included with prepaid orders
- Lost packets replaced free of charge

## Who Is This For?

- True crime fans
- Mystery novel readers
- Puzzle lovers
- Book clubs looking for a shared experience
- Gift givers seeking unique, memorable presents (Mother's Day, birthdays, Christmas)

## Contact

- Website: https://coldcaseclub.au
- Email: hello@coldcaseclub.au
